title: Focus Filter Off
subtitle: Authentic & Unfiltered
description: No filters, no pretending, just real ADHD energy! This design celebrates the beautiful truth of being unapologetically yourself. Featuring a camera lens metaphor with the filter turned OFF, a clear honest brain, and bold typography that speaks to authenticity. The purple-to-pink gradient represents the raw, unfiltered spectrum of an ADHD brain. Perfect for neurodivergent folks who are done hiding, done masking, and ready to show the world their real, authentic selves. Wear your truth proudly!
mockupPrompt: Product mockup on a clear phone case with a white iPhone, professional studio lighting, the phone case features a design with a camera lens graphic with a red 'OFF' switch, a clear honest brain illustration, and bold text reading 'FOCUS FILTER OFF' in white letters with a glow effect. The background is a purple to pink gradient. The phone is displayed upright on a minimalist white stand against a light gray backdrop, shot from the front, high resolution, commercial product photography style, clean and modern aesthetic
targetAudience: ADHD individuals who embrace authenticity, people done with masking, neurodivergent folks proud of their real selves
